│ ├─ toast-milestone-1: toast-card (toast-card) │
│ ├─ toast-milestone-2: toast-card (toast-card) │
│ ├─ toast-stack: toast-stack (toast-stack)     │
│ ├─ toast-stack: toast-stack (toast-stack)     │
│ └─ toast-template: toast-card (toast-card)    │
